name: Parking lot
hints: The parking lot has a dead tree, a rusty grating, and a $5 bill on the ground.
GET BILL - you need the money to buy a ticket at the fun house entrance.
The grating is closed and rusty. You might be able to open it with the right tool.
OPEN GRAT with the wrench to access the manhole below. W=fun house entrance (room 1).
notes: Parking lot with the $5 bill (needed for ticket), rusty grating (needs wrench to open, leads to manhole room 13), and dead tree. W=fun house entrance (room 1).
